quality_gates: test -f fab/.kit/VERSION && test -f fab/.kit/scripts/status.sh && echo 'core files exist'

for f in fab-init fab-new fab-continue fab-ff fab-clarify fab-apply fab-review fab-archive fab-switch fab-status; do test -L .claude/skills/$f.md && test -e .claude/skills/$f.md || echo "BROKEN: $f"; done && echo 'symlinks valid'
bash fab/.kit/scripts/status.sh | grep -q 'No active change' && echo 'status.sh works'
test -f fab/config.yaml && test -f fab/constitution.md && test -f fab/docs/index.md && test -d fab/changes && echo 'bootstrap complete'
title: Create shared context preamble (_context.md)
